# ReeveOS (reeveos.app)
> Zero-commission booking, ordering, and business management platform for UK restaurants, salons, barbers, and service businesses.

ReeveOS is a "Save the High Street" platform that replaces high-commission platforms like Deliveroo (up to 35%), UberEats (30%), and OpenTable (£2.50/cover). Businesses keep 100% of their revenue with Rezvo's flat monthly pricing.

## For Businesses
- Online booking with real-time availability
- Table management with interactive floor plans
- Delivery ordering via Uber Direct integration
- Stripe Connect for direct payments
- CRM, analytics, and marketing tools
- Mobile apps for owners and staff

## Pricing
- Free: £0/mo (1 staff, 100 bookings)
- Starter: £8.99/mo (3 staff)
- Growth: £29/mo (5 staff, deposits, CRM)
- Scale: £59/mo (unlimited, floor plan, white-label)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing

## Links
- Business Platform: https://reeveos.app
- Consumer Directory: https://reeveos.app
